articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

keyEvents.text: Carlos Vázquez (Cuba) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Amir Daley (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Antigua and Barbuda 0, Cuba 1. Pedro Bravo (Cuba) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Diego Catasus with a cross following a corner.
